examples: This didn't mean he would not cook the butterfish.
Butterfish weren't prime eating but, at five kilos, the biggest meant many fish cakes.
Some local favorites are Lau Lau (pork chicken or vegetables steamed in a pouch of ti leaves), Lomi Salmon, Butterfish, Poke (a raw ahi tuna salad) and Poi (a dish made with mashed taro).
Recent entrees included grilled chicken pumpkin seed mole, miso yaki butterfish, and grilled game hen and sweet bitters.
